Capital Markets Insurance About Vermeg About Vermeg ##### Leading the way in financial software solutions With deep industry expertise and a strong track record of innovation, Vermeg designs and delivers mission-critical software that powers the core operations of financial institutions. We help our clients operate with resilience, efficiency and confidence, while providing a high standard of service and client experience.​ Vermeg delivers advanced software solutions across Capital Markets and Insurance , enabling financial institutions to manage Collateral Management ,Post-Trade Operations , Asset Servicing , Policy Administration and Regulatory Processes. Trusted by Market Infrastructures, Banks , Asset Servicers , Insurers and Asset Managers , our platforms support compliance, operational excellence and sustainable performance across complex and regulated environments.​ Through decades, we evolve to meet the dynamic needs of the market with offerings that address the unique challenges faced by financial institutions, including solutions Capital Markets and Insurance that streamline operations, ensure compliance, and drive growth. Vermeg by the Numbers ##### Excellence without borders Vermeg is a global, leading finance software provider. 30+ Years of expertise 40+ Countries 160+ Clients 23+ Central banks 30+ Staff percentage in R&D ##### Who we serve ? Our specialized solutions for Capital Markets, and Insurance serve the needs of institutions across financial sectors. ###### Capital Markets We provide integrated solutions for collateral management, post-trade processing, and optimization across market infrastructures, banks, and buy-side institutions. Through our end-to-end solutions, we help central banks, custodians, and asset managers achieve efficiency and resilience in an evolving financial landscape. We help market infrastructures, banks, and buy-side firms reduce risk, optimize collateral, and streamline post-trade processes ###### Insurance Drive your growth, streamline operations, enhance customer interactions, and achieve compliance with our advanced solutions for life, health and property insurers and asset managers. Solutions ##### Featured solutions Our solutions for capital markets and insurance. Leading suite for post-trade processing Colline-1 The collateral technology of the future. Exhaustive life insurance solution. Single core solution for portfolio management. Ready-to-use low-code no-code platform. ###### Explore our solutions Discover a range of our solutions designed to empower your financial institution. Leading suite for post-trade processing. The collateral technology of the future. Robust solution to optimize and automate asset allocations. Exhaustive life insurance solution. Single core solution for portfolio management. Ready-to-use low-code no-code platform. View All Solutions Words from our Chairman ##### Unwavering focus “At Vermeg , we redefine success in capital markets and insurance. Through a relentless focus on operational excellence, innovation, and strategic partnerships, we empower our clients to thrive in today’s complex financial landscape.” BADREDDINE OUALI Chairman Supervisory Board Testimonials ##### Words from our clients and partners “En misant sur une technologie évolutive et robuste, la MIF confirme son engagement à innover au service de la performance et de la satisfactions de ses adhérents.” OLIVIER SENTIS Directeur Général de la MIF New ECMS Strengthens Eurozone’s Financial Backbone “The launch of ECMS represents a major step in the integration of European financial markets. By replacing national systems with a single harmonized platform, it ensures that cash, securities, and collateral flow seamlessly across Europe, simplifies processes for counterparties, and strengthens the efficiency of monetary policy and resilience of the euro area’s market infrastructure.” Alexandre GAUTIER Deputy Director General for Financial Stability and Operations at Banque de France New ECMS Strengthens Eurozone’s Financial Backbone “With the ECMS platform, the Eurosystem completes the vision 2020 projects, enabling the smooth flow of cash, securities and collateral across Europe within the TARGET services. ECMS increases the efficiency of collateral mobilization credit operations and is a cornerstone for evolving and further harmonizing collateral management services in the euro area” Carlos CONESA Associate Director General of Operations, Markets and Payment Systems at Banco de España Eurex joins Clearstream & Vermeg partnership “A unified approach to Eurosystem Collateral Management will ultimately standardize collateral management across the Eurozone, advancing liquidity, market reliability and automation potential. Our ambition is to provide innovative and best-in-class solutions to the markets and our clients. With the help of this new partnership, we will be able to realize the potential of the ECMS for all market participants and emphasize the importance of access to central bank money. Time is now for clients to prepare implementation of ECMS and to benefit from new collateral optimization opportunities.” Frank GAST Member of the Management Board of Eurex Repo “En misant sur une technologie évolutive et robuste, la MIF confirme son engagement à innover au service de la performance et de la satisfactions de ses adhérents.” OLIVIER SENTIS Directeur Général de la MIF New ECMS Strengthens Eurozone’s Financial Backbone “The launch of ECMS represents a major step in the integration of European financial markets. By replacing national systems with a single harmonized platform, it ensures that cash, securities, and collateral flow seamlessly across Europe, simplifies processes for counterparties, and strengthens the efficiency of monetary policy and resilience of the euro area’s market infrastructure.” Alexandre GAUTIER Deputy Director General for Financial Stability and Operations at Banque de France Events ##### Featured events Join our webinars and workshops to engage with experts and explore Vermeg’s solutions for industry innovation. Event February 3, 2026 at Paris, France ###### ISDA – Driving Digital Transformation at Vermeg is pleased to take part in the ISDA: Driving Digital Transformation event and to actively contribute to this important industry initiative. Vermeg is pleased to take part in the ISDA: Driving Digital Transformation event and to actively contribute to this important industry initiative. Explore event Event January 27-29, 2026 at European Convention Center, Luxembourg ###### GFF Summit 2026 at Vermeg will attend GFF Summit 2026 from January 27 to 29 at the European Convention Center Luxembourg, to engage with industry leaders and share perspectives on how collateral can move beyond operational efficiency Vermeg will attend GFF Summit 2026 from January 27 to 29 at the European Convention Center Luxembourg, to engage with industry leaders and share perspectives on how collateral can move beyond operational efficiency Explore event Resources ##### Case Studies Explore expert content and industry reports. See how Vermeg’s technology empowers sectors to excel in today’s landscape. Banking Empowering Market Operations: A Major G7 Bank’s Blueprint for Resilience and Innovation A major G7 central bank partnered with Vermeg to modernize its post-trade operations using Megara. The new system automates collateral processes and increases processing times by 50% and enhancing liquidity support during market stress.​ Case Study | June 26, 2025 Banking Optimizing Efficiency and Agility: Powering a major Central Bank payment operations A European central bank partnered with Vermeg to enhance market operations using its Xchanger solution. Case Study | July 4, 2025 ##### Talk with a Vermeg expert Understand how your financial institution can benefit from our solutions and partner network by booking time with a Vermeg expert. Schedule a session With over 30 years of expertise, we are dedicated to delivering exceptional client service whilst transforming financial operations through our innovative offerings in capital markets and insurance. About Vermeg
About Vermeg 
##### Leading the way in financial software solutions
![vermeg - Capital markets banking and insurance software solutions](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Corporate-picture-WEB-01-1024x759.png)
With deep industry expertise and a strong track record of innovation, Vermeg designs and delivers mission-critical software that powers the core operations of financial institutions. We help our clients operate with resilience, efficiency and confidence, while providing a high standard of service and client experience.​
Vermeg delivers advanced software solutions across **Capital Markets** and **Insurance** , enabling financial institutions to manage **Collateral Management** ,**Post-Trade Operations** , **Asset Servicing** , **Policy Administration** and **Regulatory Processes**.
Trusted by **Market Infrastructures, Banks** , **Asset** **Servicers** , **Insurers** and **Asset** **Managers** , our platforms support compliance, operational excellence and sustainable performance across complex and regulated environments.​
Through decades, we evolve to meet the dynamic needs of the market with offerings that address the unique challenges faced by financial institutions, including solutions Capital Markets and Insurance that streamline operations, ensure compliance, and drive growth.
[ Learn More ](https://www.vermeg.com/about-us/)

##### Who we serve ?
Our specialized solutions for Capital Markets, and Insurance serve the needs of institutions across financial sectors.
###### Capital Markets
We provide integrated solutions for collateral management, post-trade processing, and optimization across market infrastructures, banks, and buy-side institutions. Through our end-to-end solutions, we help central banks, custodians, and asset managers achieve efficiency and resilience in an evolving financial landscape.
We help market infrastructures, banks, and buy-side firms reduce risk, optimize collateral, and streamline post-trade processes
[ Learn more ](https://www.vermeg.com/capital-markets/)
###### Insurance
Drive your growth, streamline operations, enhance customer interactions, and achieve compliance with our advanced solutions for life, health and property insurers and asset managers.

**[Read more](https://www.vermeg.com/news/la-mif-choisit-solife-la-solution-innovante-de-vermeg-pour-moderniser-la-gestion-de-ses-contrats-depargne-de-retraite-et-de-prevoyance/)**
OLIVIER SENTIS
Directeur Général de la MIF
[**New ECMS Strengthens Eurozone’s Financial Backbone**](https://www.vermeg.com/news/new-ecms-strengthens-eurozones-financial-backbone/)
_“The launch of ECMS represents a major step in the integration of European financial markets. By replacing national systems with a single harmonized platform, it ensures that cash, securities, and collateral flow seamlessly across Europe, simplifies processes for counterparties, and strengthens the efficiency of monetary policy and resilience of the euro area’s market infrastructure.”_
Alexandre GAUTIER
Deputy Director General for Financial Stability and Operations at Banque de France
[**New ECMS Strengthens Eurozone’s Financial Backbone**](https://www.vermeg.com/news/new-ecms-strengthens-eurozones-financial-backbone/)
_“With the ECMS platform, the Eurosystem completes the vision 2020 projects, enabling the smooth flow of cash, securities and collateral across Europe within the TARGET services. ECMS increases the efficiency of collateral mobilization credit operations and is a cornerstone for evolving and further harmonizing collateral management services in the euro area”_
Carlos CONESA
Associate Director General of Operations, Markets and Payment Systems at Banco de España
[**Eurex joins Clearstream & Vermeg partnership**](https://www.vermeg.com/news/eurex-joins-clearstream-vermeg-partnership/)
_“A unified approach to Eurosystem Collateral Management will ultimately standardize collateral management across the Eurozone, advancing liquidity, market reliability and automation potential. Our ambition is to provide innovative and best-in-class solutions to the markets and our clients. With the help of this new partnership, we will be able to realize the potential of the ECMS for all market participants and emphasize the importance of access to central bank money. Time is now for clients to prepare implementation of ECMS and to benefit from new collateral optimization opportunities.”_

# The collateral management technology of the future
Control risk, manage collateral services, and leverage margin automation across all asset classes with our cutting-edge Colline solution.

About Colline 
##### The one-stop shop for collateral management
Designed specifically for banks, asset managers, and servicers, our Colline web-based platform enables you to optimize costs, automate margin calls, and improve liquidity. 
With Colline, manage collateral workflows across asset classes — from derivatives to repos, SBL, TBAs, and ETDs. Additionally, enhance your operational efficiency while reducing IT costs by capitalizing on scalable SaaS technology and PostgreSQL.
[ Schedule a session to learn more ](https://www.vermeg.com/contact-us/)
About Colline 
##### The one-stop shop for collateral management
![Optimize collateral, automate margin calls & ensure compliance with Colline—scalable, cross-asset SaaS collateral management.](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Colline-Web-03-1024x759.png)
Benefits 
##### Colline's key benefits
Boost operational efficiency
Enhance value-added collateral services to improve operational efficiency and asset utilization.
Forward ladder inventory views
Improve visibility with forward ladder inventory, enabling proactive asset management.
Optimization algorithms
Run bespoke and defined algorithms to maximize collateral efficiency and optimize asset allocation.
Reduce total collateral management costs
Consolidate and automate workflows across asset classes, leveraging SaaS to reduce IT and funding costs.
Regulatory compliance
Ensure seamless adherence to evolving regulations, reducing risk for financial institutions.

Features 
##### Key Features
End-to-end collateral management
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-1-min.jpg)
  * Manages the complete collateral lifecycle, encompassing margin calls, collateral optimization, dispute resolution, and reporting
  * Automates workflows to boost efficiency and minimize manual tasks


Cross-asset coverage
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-2-min.jpg)
  * Oversees collateral management across diverse asset classes, including securities, cash, and commodities
  * Ensures flexibility and adaptability to varying market conditions and regulatory requirements.


Regulatory compliance
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-3-min.jpg)
  * Adheres to global regulatory standards such as EMIR, Dodd-Frank, and Basel III.
  * Offers tools for regulatory reporting and ensures compliance with changing regulations


Real-time processing
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-4-min.jpg)
  * Delivers real-time data processing and updates to facilitate prompt decision-making
  * Ensures real-time connectivity with market infrastructures and counterparties

Collateral optimization
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-5-min.jpg)
  * Enhances collateral allocation and usage to reduce costs and boost efficiency
  * Employs sophisticated algorithms and analytics to identify the most effective collateral options


Integration capabilities
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-7-min.jpg)
  * Seamlessly integrates with existing systems and infrastructures, including trading platforms, risk management systems, and market data providers
  * Provides APIs and connectors to facilitate smooth integration and data flow


Risk management

  * Offers tools for monitoring and managing counterparty, market, and operational risks

Who we are 
##### Empowering Financial Services Through Innovation 
![vermeg - Capital markets banking and insurance software solutions](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Corporate-picture-WEB-01-1024x759.png)
With a global footprint and over 30 years of expertise, Vermeg is committed to being the trusted partner for financial institutions worldwide.  
  

Our innovative Capital Markets solutions and Insurance solutions empower clients to optimize collateral workflows and enhance insurance processes with unmatched efficiency.  
  

Building on our advanced technology and deep industry insights, we help you navigate the evolving landscape of financial services and stand out in your sector by providing cutting-edge solutions, expertise, and dedicated support.
[ Explore our solutions ](https://www.vermeg.com/solutions/)

##### Mission and values
######  Mission 
As a leading force in the financial services industry, we deliver market leading solutions, expertise, and unwavering support to financial institutions — driven by the conviction to create a positive, long-term impact on society and the environment.
######  Values 
###### Commitment
We are dedicated to delivering top-tier solutions with unwavering focus, ensuring our clients achieve success through reliability, precision, and quality.
###### Ingenuity
We embrace creativity and innovation, continuously seeking new ways to solve challenges and improve our offerings. Our ingenuity fuels progress across the financial services industry.
###### Authenticity
We believe in fostering trust and transparency, always maintaining integrity in how we engage with clients, partners, and employees.
Our solutions 
##### Who we serve
####  Insurance 
######  Life and pension 
Comprehensive, end-to-end policy administration system solution and services for insurers across life, wealth, and retirement.
######  Healthcare and protection 
Integrated healthcare insurance management software to help insurers automate core processes, improve seamless individual and collective subscription processes, and maximize efficiency.
######  Property and casualty 
P&C insurance software for businesses and individuals seeking protection from risks like natural disasters, accidents, and liability.
####  Capital Markets 
######  Central Banks 
Solutions for collateral management, cash management, and settlement including corporate actions, referential/position keeping, reporting, and stock lending.
######  CSDs 
Solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and efficient post-trade processes.
######  Banks and buy-side institutions 
Solutions for collateral management, liquidity optimization, risk mitigation, trade settlement, and efficient asset servicing.
######  Asset Servicers 
Solutions for efficient management of securities, corporate actions, and fund administration, ensuring accurate and timely service delivery across the asset servicing spectrum.
######  CCPs 
Tailored solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and broker clearing.

Security 
##### Information Security
Achieving excellence in security, every step of the way.
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/gradient-technology-background-1.jpg)
Our approach 
At Vermeg, we integrate security into every aspect of our operations — from solutions to overall security measures. We are committed to the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of your data; our services are designed around these core principles.
Our priority 
Vermeg has implemented an integrated management system (IMS) that encompasses both ISMS and PIMS, in accordance with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 and ISO/IEC 27701:2019 standards. We conduct regular independent audits to verify and confirm the effectiveness of these controls and consistently surpass our customers’ security expectations.
Our policy 
[**Vermeg’s Information Security Policy**](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/VER_ISO_PO_001_EN-IS-Policy-statement-objectives-Version-8.5.pdf) — statement and objectives — is endorsed by senior management and signed by our Co-CEOs. This endorsement aligns our security goals with our business objectives and highlights our commitment to integrating security into every aspect of our operations. It reflects our strategic and thorough approach to safeguarding information as part of our corporate governance.
#####  CSR cornerstones at Vermeg 
Dedicated to making a meaningful impact — from environmental care to cultural enrichment and inclusive opportunities.
######  /1 
######  Carbon neutral 
Vermeg focuses on reducing carbon emissions, promoting sustainable practices across the supply chain, and encouraging eco-friendly behaviors among employees.
######  /2 
######  Equal opportunity for all 
Vermeg’s commitment to equal opportunity emphasizes diversity, fairness, accessibility, empowerment, while promoting community engagement and active opposition to discrimination.
######  /3 
######  Art and culture 
Vermeg’s art and culture CSR initiatives support a wide range of artistic expressions, improve access to cultural experiences, and uplift emerging artists, enriching communities in the process.
[ Learn more about our CSR initiatives ](https://www.vermeg.com/csr/)

## About Vermeg
At Vermeg, we specialize in meeting the evolving needs of the financial sector, providing industry-leading solutions that enhance operational efficiency, improve customer experience, and reduce costs.
Through our agile methodology, we ensure swift system modernization, empowering our clients to stay competitive in a dynamic market.
[ Learn more ](https://www.vermeg.com/about-us/)

About Colline 
##### The one-stop shop for collateral management
Designed specifically for banks, asset managers, and servicers, our Colline web-based platform enables you to optimize costs, automate margin calls, and improve liquidity. 
With Colline, manage collateral workflows across asset classes — from derivatives to repos, SBL, TBAs, and ETDs. Additionally, enhance your operational efficiency while reducing IT costs by capitalizing on scalable SaaS technology and PostgreSQL.
[ Schedule a session to learn more ](https://www.vermeg.com/contact-us/)

Features 
##### Key Features
End-to-end collateral management
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-1-min.jpg)
  * Manages the complete collateral lifecycle, encompassing margin calls, collateral optimization, dispute resolution, and reporting
  * Automates workflows to boost efficiency and minimize manual tasks


Cross-asset coverage
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-2-min.jpg)
  * Oversees collateral management across diverse asset classes, including securities, cash, and commodities
  * Ensures flexibility and adaptability to varying market conditions and regulatory requirements.


Regulatory compliance
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-3-min.jpg)
  * Adheres to global regulatory standards such as EMIR, Dodd-Frank, and Basel III.
  * Offers tools for regulatory reporting and ensures compliance with changing regulations


Real-time processing
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/key-Features-4-min.jpg)
  * Delivers real-time data processing and updates to facilitate prompt decision-making
  * Ensures real-time connectivity with market infrastructures and counterparties

Collateral optimization

  * Enhances collateral allocation and usage to reduce costs and boost efficiency
  * Employs sophisticated algorithms and analytics to identify the most effective collateral options


Integration capabilities

  * Seamlessly integrates with existing systems and infrastructures, including trading platforms, risk management systems, and market data providers

Risk management

Who we are 
##### Empowering Financial Services Through Innovation 
![vermeg - Capital markets banking and insurance software solutions](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/04/Corporate-picture-WEB-01-1024x759.png)
With a global footprint and over 30 years of expertise, Vermeg is committed to being the trusted partner for financial institutions worldwide.  
  

Our innovative Capital Markets solutions and Insurance solutions empower clients to optimize collateral workflows and enhance insurance processes with unmatched efficiency.  
  

Building on our advanced technology and deep industry insights, we help you navigate the evolving landscape of financial services and stand out in your sector by providing cutting-edge solutions, expertise, and dedicated support.
[ Explore our solutions ](https://www.vermeg.com/solutions/)
Vermeg by the Numbers 
##### Excellence without borders 
Vermeg is a global, leading finance software provider.

Years of expertise

Countries

Clients

Central banks

##### Mission and values
######  Mission 
As a leading force in the financial services industry, we deliver market leading solutions, expertise, and unwavering support to financial institutions — driven by the conviction to create a positive, long-term impact on society and the environment.
######  Values 
###### Commitment
We are dedicated to delivering top-tier solutions with unwavering focus, ensuring our clients achieve success through reliability, precision, and quality.
###### Ingenuity
We embrace creativity and innovation, continuously seeking new ways to solve challenges and improve our offerings. Our ingenuity fuels progress across the financial services industry.
###### Authenticity
We believe in fostering trust and transparency, always maintaining integrity in how we engage with clients, partners, and employees.
Our solutions 
##### Who we serve
####  Insurance 
######  Life and pension 
Comprehensive, end-to-end policy administration system solution and services for insurers across life, wealth, and retirement.
######  Healthcare and protection 
Integrated healthcare insurance management software to help insurers automate core processes, improve seamless individual and collective subscription processes, and maximize efficiency.
######  Property and casualty 
P&C insurance software for businesses and individuals seeking protection from risks like natural disasters, accidents, and liability.
####  Capital Markets 
######  Central Banks 
Solutions for collateral management, cash management, and settlement including corporate actions, referential/position keeping, reporting, and stock lending.
######  CSDs 
Solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and efficient post-trade processes.
######  Banks and buy-side institutions 
Solutions for collateral management, liquidity optimization, risk mitigation, trade settlement, and efficient asset servicing.
######  Asset Servicers 
Solutions for efficient management of securities, corporate actions, and fund administration, ensuring accurate and timely service delivery across the asset servicing spectrum.
######  CCPs 
Tailored solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and broker clearing.

##### Awards and Recognitions

FTF News Technology

Security 
##### Information Security
Achieving excellence in security, every step of the way.
![](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/gradient-technology-background-1.jpg)
Our approach 
At Vermeg, we integrate security into every aspect of our operations — from solutions to overall security measures. We are committed to the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of your data; our services are designed around these core principles.
Our priority 
Vermeg has implemented an integrated management system (IMS) that encompasses both ISMS and PIMS, in accordance with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 and ISO/IEC 27701:2019 standards. We conduct regular independent audits to verify and confirm the effectiveness of these controls and consistently surpass our customers’ security expectations.
Our policy 
[**Vermeg’s Information Security Policy**](https://www.vermeg.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/VER_ISO_PO_001_EN-IS-Policy-statement-objectives-Version-8.5.pdf) — statement and objectives — is endorsed by senior management and signed by our Co-CEOs. This endorsement aligns our security goals with our business objectives and highlights our commitment to integrating security into every aspect of our operations. It reflects our strategic and thorough approach to safeguarding information as part of our corporate governance.
#####  CSR cornerstones at Vermeg 
Dedicated to making a meaningful impact — from environmental care to cultural enrichment and inclusive opportunities.
######  /1 
######  Carbon neutral 
Vermeg focuses on reducing carbon emissions, promoting sustainable practices across the supply chain, and encouraging eco-friendly behaviors among employees.
######  /2 
######  Equal opportunity for all 
Vermeg’s commitment to equal opportunity emphasizes diversity, fairness, accessibility, empowerment, while promoting community engagement and active opposition to discrimination.
######  /3 
######  Art and culture 
Vermeg’s art and culture CSR initiatives support a wide range of artistic expressions, improve access to cultural experiences, and uplift emerging artists, enriching communities in the process.
[ Learn more about our CSR initiatives ](https://www.vermeg.com/csr/)
Locations 
##### Global presence
Our offices are innovation hubs where collaboration thrives, driving progress and excellence across continents.
With a global footprint encompassing 15 locations across Europe, Asia, and America, Vermeg serves over 160 clients worldwide.
[ See Vermeg offices worldwide ](https://www.vermeg.com/about-us/our-locations/)
##### Talk with a Vermeg expert
Understand how your financial institution can benefit from our solutions and partner network by booking time with a Vermeg expert.

## About Vermeg
At Vermeg, we specialize in meeting the evolving needs of the financial sector, providing industry-leading solutions that enhance operational efficiency, improve customer experience, and reduce costs.
Through our agile methodology, we ensure swift system modernization, empowering our clients to stay competitive in a dynamic market.
[ Learn more ](https://www.vermeg.com/about-us/)
##### Talk with a Vermeg expert
See how your institution can benefit from our solutions for the finance and insurance sectors and our partner network’s combined capabilities.

Download brochure Overview Overview Key benefits Colline at a glance Recognition Key features About Colline ##### The one-stop shop for collateral management Designed specifically for banks, asset managers, and servicers, our Colline web-based platform enables you to optimize costs, automate margin calls, and improve liquidity. With Colline, manage collateral workflows across asset classes — from derivatives to repos, SBL, TBAs, and ETDs. Additionally, enhance your operational efficiency while reducing IT costs by capitalizing on scalable SaaS technology and PostgreSQL. Schedule a session to learn more About Colline ##### The one-stop shop for collateral management Benefits ##### Colline's key benefits Boost operational efficiency Enhance value-added collateral services to improve operational efficiency and asset utilization. Home Solutions Colline Colline The collateral management technology of the future Control risk, manage collateral services, and leverage margin automation across all asset classes with our cutting-edge Colline solution. Download brochure Overview * Overview * Key benefits * Colline at a glance * Recognition * Key features

About Colline ##### The one-stop shop for collateral management Designed specifically for banks, asset managers, and servicers, our Colline web-based platform enables you to optimize costs, automate margin calls, and improve liquidity. With Colline, manage collateral workflows across asset classes — from derivatives to repos, SBL, TBAs, and ETDs. Additionally, enhance your operational efficiency while reducing IT costs by capitalizing on scalable SaaS technology and PostgreSQL. Schedule a session to learn more About Colline ##### The one-stop shop for collateral management

Benefits ##### Colline's key benefits Boost operational efficiency Enhance value-added collateral services to improve operational efficiency and asset utilization. Forward ladder inventory views Improve visibility with forward ladder inventory, enabling proactive asset management. Optimization algorithms Run bespoke and defined algorithms to maximize collateral efficiency and optimize asset allocation. Reduce total collateral management costs Consolidate and automate workflows across asset classes, leveraging SaaS to reduce IT and funding costs. Regulatory compliance Ensure seamless adherence to evolving regulations, reducing risk for financial institutions. * Manages the complete collateral lifecycle, encompassing margin calls, collateral optimization, dispute resolution, and reporting * Automates workflows to boost efficiency and minimize manual tasks
Cross-asset coverage

* Oversees collateral management across diverse asset classes, including securities, cash, and commodities * Ensures flexibility and adaptability to varying market conditions and regulatory requirements.
Regulatory compliance
* Adheres to global regulatory standards such as EMIR, Dodd-Frank, and Basel III. * Offers tools for regulatory reporting and ensures compliance with changing regulations
Real-time processing
* Delivers real-time data processing and updates to facilitate prompt decision-making * Ensures real-time connectivity with market infrastructures and counterparties
Collateral optimization
* Enhances collateral allocation and usage to reduce costs and boost efficiency * Employs sophisticated algorithms and analytics to identify the most effective collateral options
Integration capabilities

* Seamlessly integrates with existing systems and infrastructures, including trading platforms, risk management systems, and market data providers * Provides APIs and connectors to facilitate smooth integration and data flow
Risk management
* • Delivers real-time risk analytics and reporting to aid in mitigating potential exposures * Offers tools for monitoring and managing counterparty, market, and operational risks
Reporting and analytics
* Provides extensive reporting tools for creating both standard and custom reports * Features advanced analytics for detailed insights into collateral positions, trends, and performance

Mission and value Mission and value Who we serve Recognition Clients and partners Leadership Information security CSR Mission and value Mission and value Who we serve Recognition Clients and partners Leadership Information security CSR Who we are ##### Empowering Financial Services Through Innovation With a global footprint and over 30 years of expertise, Vermeg is committed to being the trusted partner for financial institutions worldwide. Our innovative Capital Markets solutions and Insurance solutions empower clients to optimize collateral workflows and enhance insurance processes with unmatched efficiency. Building on our advanced technology and deep industry insights, we help you navigate the evolving landscape of financial services and stand out in your sector by providing cutting-edge solutions, expertise, and dedicated support. Explore our solutions Vermeg by the Numbers ##### Excellence without borders Vermeg is a global, leading finance software provider. 30+ Years of expertise 40+ Countries 160+ Clients 23+ Central banks 30+ Staff percentage in R&D ##### Mission and values ###### Mission As a leading force in the financial services industry, we deliver market leading solutions, expertise, and unwavering support to financial institutions — driven by the conviction to create a positive, long-term impact on society and the environment. ###### Values ###### Commitment We are dedicated to delivering top-tier solutions with unwavering focus, ensuring our clients achieve success through reliability, precision, and quality. ###### Ingenuity We embrace creativity and innovation, continuously seeking new ways to solve challenges and improve our offerings. Our ingenuity fuels progress across the financial services industry. ###### Authenticity We believe in fostering trust and transparency, always maintaining integrity in how we engage with clients, partners, and employees. Our solutions ##### Who we serve Insurance ###### Life and pension Comprehensive, end-to-end policy administration system solution and services for insurers across life, wealth, and retirement. ###### Healthcare and protection Integrated healthcare insurance management software to help insurers automate core processes, improve seamless individual and collective subscription processes, and maximize efficiency. ###### Property and casualty P&C insurance software for businesses and individuals seeking protection from risks like natural disasters, accidents, and liability. Capital Markets ###### Central Banks Solutions for collateral management, cash management, and settlement including corporate actions, referential/position keeping, reporting, and stock lending. ###### CSDs Solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and efficient post-trade processes. ###### Banks and buy-side institutions Solutions for collateral management, liquidity optimization, risk mitigation, trade settlement, and efficient asset servicing. ###### Asset Servicers Solutions for efficient management of securities, corporate actions, and fund administration, ensuring accurate and timely service delivery across the asset servicing spectrum. ###### CCPs Tailored solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and broker clearing. Insurance ###### Life and pension Comprehensive, end-to-end policy administration system solution and services for insurers across life, wealth, and retirement. ###### Healthcare and protection Integrated healthcare insurance management software to help insurers automate core processes, improve seamless individual and collective subscription processes, and maximize efficiency. ###### Property and casualty P&C insurance software for businesses and individuals seeking protection from risks like natural disasters, accidents, and liability. Capital Markets ###### Central Banks Solutions for collateral management, cash management, and settlement including corporate actions, referential/position keeping, reporting, and stock lending. ###### CSDs Solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and efficient post-trade processes. ###### Banks and buy-side institutions Solutions for collateral management, liquidity optimization, risk mitigation, trade settlement, and efficient asset servicing. ###### Asset Servicers Solutions for efficient management of securities, corporate actions, and fund administration, ensuring accurate and timely service delivery across the asset servicing spectrum. ###### CCPs Tailored solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and broker clearing. Capital Markets ###### Central Banks Solutions for collateral management, cash management, and settlement including corporate actions, referential/position keeping, reporting, and stock lending. ###### Banks and buy-side institutions Solutions for collateral management, liquidity optimization, risk mitigation, trade settlement, and efficient asset servicing. ###### CCPs Tailored solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and broker clearing. ###### CSDs Solutions for collateral management, cash management, settlement, corporate actions, referential/position keeping, and efficient post-trade processes. ###### Asset servicers Solutions for efficient management of securities, corporate actions, and fund administration, ensuring accurate and timely service delivery across the asset servicing spectrum. Insurance ###### Life and pension Comprehensive, end-to-end policy administration system solution and services for insurers across life, wealth, and retirement. ###### Property and casualty P&C insurance software for businesses and individuals seeking protection from risks like natural disasters, accidents, and liability. ###### Healthcare and protection Integrated healthcare insurance management software to help insurers automate core processes, improve seamless individual and collective subscription processes, and maximize efficiency. Our achievements ##### Awards and Recognitions FTF News Technology ###### Best Sell-Side Collateral Management Solution 2025 Vermeg’s Colline is proud to win The Best Sell-Side Collateral Management Solution 2025 by FTF News Technology Central Banking Awards ###### Winner of the Central Banking Technology Services Award 2025 Vermeg is proud to win Central Banking’s Technology Services Award 2025 Learn more AICPA – SOC ###### SOC 2 Type II In recognition of Vermeg’s continued commitment to protecting customer data. SWIFT Securities Settlement 2025 ###### Securities Settlement Vermeg is honored to receive the 2025 SWIFT Certification label for “Securities Settlement” SWIFT Corporate Actions 2025 ###### Corporate Actions Vermeg is honored to receive the 2025 SWIFT Certification label for “Corporate Actions” Swift – Compatible Application 2025 ###### Collateral Management Vermeg is honored to receive the prestigious 2025 SWIFT Certification label for “Collateral Management” See all awards Leadership ##### Meet our Leaders ###### Soundes MEJDOUB Legal LinkedIn ###### Francisco JARREGA Europe & UK LinkedIn ###### Joseph KUBEYKA APAC & Middle East LinkedIn ###### Tarak ACHICH CEO LinkedIn ###### Mousser JERBI Operations, Compliance & Risk LinkedIn ###### Eric GUILHOU Finance LinkedIn ###### Khaled BEN ABDELJELIL Europe & UK LinkedIn ###### Imed BEN MIMOUN Market Operations LinkedIn ###### Brahim HALMAOUI Americas LinkedIn ###### Anis LOUKIL Market Operations LinkedIn ###### Soundes MEJDOUB Legal LinkedIn ###### Francisco JARREGA Europe & UK LinkedIn ###### Joseph KUBEYKA APAC & Middle East LinkedIn ###### Tarak ACHICH CEO LinkedIn ###### Mousser JERBI Operations, Compliance & Risk LinkedIn ###### Eric GUILHOU Finance LinkedIn See all leadership team ##### Our partners Interested in Partnering with us? Partnership Security ##### Information Security Achieving excellence in security, every step of the way. Our approach Our priority Vermeg has implemented an integrated management system (IMS) that encompasses both ISMS and PIMS, in accordance with ISO/IEC 27001:2022 and ISO/IEC 27701:2019 standards. We conduct regular independent audits to verify and confirm the effectiveness of these controls and consistently surpass our customers’ security expectations. Our policy Vermeg’s Information Security Policy — statement and objectives — is endorsed by senior management and signed by our Co-CEOs. This endorsement aligns our security goals with our business objectives and highlights our commitment to integrating security into every aspect of our operations. It reflects our strategic and thorough approach to safeguarding information as part of our corporate governance. ##### CSR cornerstones at Vermeg Dedicated to making a meaningful impact — from environmental care to cultural enrichment and inclusive opportunities. ###### /1 ###### Carbon neutral Vermeg focuses on reducing carbon emissions, promoting sustainable practices across the supply chain, and encouraging eco-friendly behaviors among employees. ###### /2 ###### Equal opportunity for all Vermeg’s commitment to equal opportunity emphasizes diversity, fairness, accessibility, empowerment, while promoting community engagement and active opposition to discrimination. ###### /3 ###### Art and culture Vermeg’s art and culture CSR initiatives support a wide range of artistic expressions, improve access to cultural experiences, and uplift emerging artists, enriching communities in the process. Learn more about our CSR initiatives Locations ##### Global presence Our offices are innovation hubs where collaboration thrives, driving progress and excellence across continents. With a global footprint encompassing 15 locations across Europe, Asia, and America, Vermeg serves over 160 clients worldwide.
